# Repository instructions

This is an Astro static publishing website for GitHub Pages.

When creating content:

- Add posts under `src/content/posts/`.
- Add projects under `src/content/projects/`.
- Use valid frontmatter matching `src/content.config.ts`.
- Keep the site fully static.
- Do not add backend services, databases, or server-only features.
- Keep deployment compatible with GitHub Pages.
